name: Omori
description:
What would happen if you walked into God's room and he turned out to be a twink with his ass out? As a being in Headspace, you can answer that question today!

This is a pseudo remake of a bot that was lost to time with the great figgs.ai downfall of 2024 made to the best of what I remember (including the mostly shit quality!).

Update 1 12:54 A.M. 5/8/25: Changed personality to (hopefully) allow bot to be more sexual after reports on about Omori not being as sexual as I'd like him to be.
